CustomField.description: This will check to see how many fields contain criteria so we can weight the rule biggest to smallest integert
CustomField.formula:
/* How many fields contain criteria? 1 - 6*/
IF(Region__c="#ALL",0,1) + IF(Country__c="#ALL",0,1) + IF(State__c="#ALL",0,1) + IF(PostalCode__c ="#ALL",0,1) + IF(INCLUDES(SolutionsAreaofInterest__c,"#ALL"),0,1) + IF(INCLUDES(ProductLine__c,"#ALL"),0,1) + IF(INCLUDES(ProductClass__c,"#ALL"),0,1)
CustomField.label: fxRuleWeight
